title: Enhanced Health Indicator
description: Have an incredible health viewer on your server with absorption color health!
body:
**IT'S A PLUGIN NOT A MOD**

Have a custom Health Viewer on your server ! 
This Health Viewer will show you the health with nice colors !

Features:
- Count the absorption health 
- You can choose the world you want to display it or not!
- Set the absorpption color you want
- Set the heart color you want
- Set on or off the absorption count 

FULLY CUSTOMIZABLE HEALTH INDICATOR !!!! 

Support MiniMessage!

Just enjoy!

Look at the screenshots.
There is recommandations inside the plugin.
